revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Second Syrian Republic]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Second Syrian Republic]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Second Syrian Republic | shortname alias = Syria | flag alias = Flag of Syria (1932-1958; 1961-1963).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Syria | related2 = First Syrian Republic | related3 = Mandate of Syria | related4 = Syrian Federation | related5 = State of Syria | related6 = State of Aleppo | related7 = State of Damascus | related8 = Alawite State | related9 = Jabal Druze State </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Second Syrian Republic | shortname alias = Syria | flag alias = Flag of Syria (1932-1958; 1961-1963).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Syria | related2 = First Syrian Republic | related3 = Mandate of Syria | related4 = Syrian Federation | related5 = State of Syria | related6 = State of Aleppo | related7 = State of Damascus | related8 = Alawite State | related9 = Jabal Druze State </noinclude> }} <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Second_Syrian_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
